symbols.name: sanitizeBranchName
symbols.purpose: Sanitizes a branch name by replacing forward slashes with double dashes.
symbols.behavior: Replaces forward slashes with double dashes, leaving branch names without slashes unchanged.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle branch names with multiple consecutive slashes.

symbols.name: chunkText
symbols.purpose: Chunks text into smaller pieces based on a maximum character limit.
symbols.behavior: Splits text into chunks of maximum length, preserving text content across chunks.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle text with non-ASCII characters correctly.

symbols.name: detectLanguage
symbols.purpose: Detects the language of a file based on its extension.
symbols.behavior: Returns the detected language based on file extension, or 'Unknown' if unknown.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle file extensions that are not in the language mapping.

symbols.name: getCodeAtlasDirForRoot
symbols.purpose: Returns the path to the .codeatlas directory for a given root directory.
symbols.behavior: Returns the path to the .codeatlas directory, preserving drive letter on Windows.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle root directories that are not strings.
